message:
refactor(freeze): remove dead C code generation

- Remove generateModuleCWithManifest and all C codegen functions from frozen_registry.zig
- Remove freeze/codegen.zig (C-only codegen, no longer used)
- Remove freeze/main.zig (unused CLI entry point)
- Remove unused imports: codegen_ssa, shape_detector, shapes, symbolic_stack
- Update native_main_embed.zig polyfill register calls for new signatures
- Add @ptrCast for opaque type compatibility between different cImport instances
- Update file header comment to reflect Zig-only pipeline

Pipeline is now pure Zig: analyzeModule() -> generateModuleZig() -> native code
C code generation path is completely removed (-2337 lines of dead code)
